members.name: _GetCompositionLayer
members.summary: Returns a pointer to an [code]XrCompositionLayerBaseHeader[/code] struct to provide the given composition layer. This will only be called if the extension previously registered itself with [method OpenXRAPIExtension.register_composition_layer_provider]. [b]Note:[/b] This virtual method will be called on the render thread. Additionally, the data it returns will be used shortly after this method is called, so it needs to remain valid until the next time [method _on_pre_render] runs.

members.name: _GetCompositionLayerCount
members.summary: Returns the number of composition layers this extension wrapper provides via [method _get_composition_layer]. This will only be called if the extension previously registered itself with [method OpenXRAPIExtension.register_composition_layer_provider]. [b]Note:[/b] This virtual method will be called on the render thread. Additionally, the data it returns will be used shortly after this method is called, so it needs to remain valid until the next time [method _on_pre_render] runs.

members.name: _GetCompositionLayerOrder
members.summary: Returns an integer that will be used to sort the given composition layer provided via [method _get_composition_layer]. Lower numbers will move the layer to the front of the list, and higher numbers to the end. The default projection layer has an order of [code]0[/code], so layers provided by this method should probably be above or below (but not exactly) [code]0[/code]. This will only be called if the extension previously registered itself with [method OpenXRAPIExtension.register_composition_layer_provider]. [b]Note:[/b] This virtual method will be called on the render thread. Additionally, the data it returns will be used shortly after this method is called, so it needs to remain valid until the next time [method _on_pre_render] runs.

members.name: _GetRequestedExtensions
members.summary: Returns a [Dictionary] of OpenXR extensions related to this extension. [param xr_version] specifies the OpenXR version we're instantiating. This will be zero if the editor requests this list to flag supported features. The [Dictionary] should contain the name of the extension, mapped to a [code]bool *[/code] cast to an integer: - If the [code]bool *[/code] is a [code]nullptr[/code] this extension is mandatory. - If the [code]bool *[/code] points to a boolean, the boolean will be updated to [code]true[/code] if the extension is enabled.

members.name: _GetSuggestedTrackerNames
members.summary: Returns a [PackedStringArray] of positional tracker names that are used within the extension wrapper.

members.name: _GetViewportCompositionLayerExtensionProperties
members.summary: Gets an array of [Dictionary]s that represent properties, just like [method Object._get_property_list], that will be added to [OpenXRCompositionLayer] nodes. [b]Note:[/b] This virtual method will be called on the render thread.

members.name: _GetViewportCompositionLayerExtensionPropertyDefaults
members.summary: Gets a [Dictionary] containing the default values for the properties returned by [method _get_viewport_composition_layer_extension_properties].

members.name: _OnBeforeInstanceCreated
members.summary: Called before the OpenXR instance is created. [b]Note:[/b] This virtual method will be called on the main thread, however, it will be called [i]before[/i] OpenXR becomes involved in rendering, so it is safe to write to data that will be used by the render thread.

members.name: _OnEventPolled
members.summary: Called when there is an OpenXR event to process. When implementing, return [code]true[/code] if the event was handled, return [code]false[/code] otherwise.

members.name: _OnInstanceCreated
members.summary: Called right after the OpenXR instance is created. [b]Note:[/b] This virtual method will be called on the main thread, however, it will be called [i]before[/i] OpenXR becomes involved in rendering, so it is safe to write to data that will be used by the render thread.

members.name: _OnInstanceDestroyed
members.summary: Called right before the OpenXR instance is destroyed. [b]Note:[/b] This virtual method will be called on the main thread, however, it will be called [i]after[/i] OpenXR is done being involved in rendering, so it is safe to write to data that was used by the render thread.

members.name: _OnMainSwapchainsCreated
members.summary: Called right after the main swapchains are (re)created. [b]Note:[/b] This virtual method will be called on the render thread.

members.name: _OnPostDrawViewport
members.summary: Called right after the given viewport is rendered. [b]Note:[/b] The draw commands might only be queued at this point, not executed. [b]Note:[/b] This virtual method will be called on the render thread.

members.name: _OnPreDrawViewport
members.summary: Called right before the given viewport is rendered. [b]Note:[/b] This virtual method will be called on the render thread.

members.name: _OnPreRender
members.summary: Called right before the XR viewports begin their rendering step. [b]Note:[/b] This virtual method will be called on the render thread.

members.name: _OnProcess
members.summary: Called as part of the OpenXR process handling. This happens right before general and physics processing steps of the main loop. During this step controller data is queried and made available to game logic.

members.name: _OnRegisterMetadata
members.summary: Allows extensions to register additional controller metadata. This function is called even when the OpenXR API is not constructed as the metadata needs to be available to the editor. Extensions should also provide metadata regardless of whether they are supported on the host system. The controller data is used to setup action maps for users who may have access to the relevant hardware.

members.name: _OnSessionCreated
members.summary: Called right after the OpenXR session is created. [b]Note:[/b] This virtual method will be called on the main thread, however, it will be called [i]before[/i] OpenXR becomes involved in rendering, so it is safe to write to data that will be used by the render thread.

members.name: _OnSessionDestroyed
members.summary: Called right before the OpenXR session is destroyed. [b]Note:[/b] This virtual method will be called on the main thread, however, it will be called [i]after[/i] OpenXR is done being involved in rendering, so it is safe to write to data that was used by the render thread.

members.name: _OnStateExiting
members.summary: Called when the OpenXR session state is changed to exiting.

members.name: _OnStateFocused
members.summary: Called when the OpenXR session state is changed to focused. This state is the active state when the game runs.

members.name: _OnStateIdle
members.summary: Called when the OpenXR session state is changed to idle.

members.name: _OnStateLossPending
members.summary: Called when the OpenXR session state is changed to loss pending.

members.name: _OnStateReady
members.summary: Called when the OpenXR session state is changed to ready. This means OpenXR is ready to set up the session.

members.name: _OnStateStopping
members.summary: Called when the OpenXR session state is changed to stopping.

members.name: _OnStateSynchronized
members.summary: Called when the OpenXR session state is changed to synchronized. OpenXR also returns to this state when the application loses focus.

members.name: _OnStateVisible
members.summary: Called when the OpenXR session state is changed to visible. This means OpenXR is now ready to receive frames.

members.name: _OnSyncActions
members.summary: Called when OpenXR has performed its action sync.

members.name: _OnViewportCompositionLayerDestroyed
members.summary: Called when a composition layer created via [OpenXRCompositionLayer] is destroyed. [param layer] is a pointer to an [code]XrCompositionLayerBaseHeader[/code] struct.

members.name: _PrepareViewConfiguration
members.summary: Called before [method _set_view_configuration_and_get_next_pointer] to allow the extension to reserve data for the given number of views.

members.name: _PrintViewConfigurationInfo
members.summary: Called to allow an extension to print additional information about its view configuration, if applicable. This will only be called if verbose output is enabled.

members.name: _SetAndroidSurfaceSwapchainCreateInfoAndGetNextPointer
members.summary: Add additional data structures to Android surface swapchains created by [OpenXRCompositionLayer]. [param property_values] contains the values of the properties returned by [method _get_viewport_composition_layer_extension_properties]. [b]Note:[/b] This virtual method will be called on the render thread.

members.name: _SetFrameEndInfoAndGetNextPointer
members.summary: Add additional data structures to [code]XrFrameEndInfo[/code]. This will only be called if the extension previously registered itself with [method OpenXRAPIExtension.register_frame_info_extension]. [b]Note:[/b] This virtual method will be called on the render thread. Additionally, the data it returns will be used shortly after this method is called, so it needs to remain valid until the next time [method _on_pre_render] runs.

members.name: _SetFrameWaitInfoAndGetNextPointer
members.summary: Add additional data structures to [code]XrFrameWaitInfo[/code]. This will only be called if the extension previously registered itself with [method OpenXRAPIExtension.register_frame_info_extension]. [b]Note:[/b] This virtual method will be called on the render thread.

members.name: _SetHandJointLocationsAndGetNextPointer
members.summary: Add additional data structures when each hand tracker is created.

members.name: _SetInstanceCreateInfoAndGetNextPointer
members.summary: Add additional data structures when the OpenXR instance is created. [param xr_version] specifies the OpenXR version we're instantiating.

members.name: _SetProjectionLayerAndGetNextPointer
members.summary: Adds additional data structures to [code]XrCompositionLayerProjection[/code]. This will only be called if the extension previously registered itself with [method OpenXRAPIExtension.register_projection_layer_extension].

members.name: _SetProjectionViewsAndGetNextPointer
members.summary: Add additional data structures to the projection view of the given [param view_index]. [b]Note:[/b] This virtual method will be called on the render thread. Additionally, the data it returns will be used shortly after this method is called, so it needs to remain valid until the next time [method _on_pre_render] runs.

members.name: _SetReferenceSpaceCreateInfoAndGetNextPointer
members.summary: Add additional data structures to [code]XrReferenceSpaceCreateInfo[/code].

members.name: _SetSessionCreateAndGetNextPointer
members.summary: Add additional data structures when the OpenXR session is created.

members.name: _SetSwapchainCreateInfoAndGetNextPointer
members.summary: Add additional data structures when creating OpenXR swapchains.

members.name: _SetSystemPropertiesAndGetNextPointer
members.summary: Add additional data structures when querying OpenXR system abilities.

members.name: _SetViewConfigurationAndGetNextPointer
members.summary: Add additional data structures when querying OpenXR view configuration.

members.name: _SetViewLocateInfoAndGetNextPointer
members.summary: Add additional data structures to [code]XrViewLocateInfo[/code]. This will only be called if the extension previously registered itself with [method OpenXRAPIExtension.register_frame_info_extension]. [b]Note:[/b] This virtual method will be called on the render thread. Additionally, the data it returns will be used shortly after this method is called, so it needs to remain valid until the next time [method _on_pre_render] runs.

members.name: _SetViewportCompositionLayerAndGetNextPointer
members.signature: public int _SetViewportCompositionLayerAndGetNextPointer(const void* layer, Dictionary propertyValues, void* nextPointer)
members.summary: Add additional data structures to composition layers created by [OpenXRCompositionLayer]. [param property_values] contains the values of the properties returned by [method _get_viewport_composition_layer_extension_properties]. [param layer] is a pointer to an [code]XrCompositionLayerBaseHeader[/code] struct. [b]Note:[/b] This virtual method will be called on the render thread. Additionally, the data it returns will be used shortly after this method is called, so it needs to remain valid until the next time [method _on_pre_render] runs.

members.name: GetOpenxrApi
members.summary: Returns the created [OpenXRAPIExtension], which can be used to access the OpenXR API.

members.name: RegisterExtensionWrapper
members.summary: Registers the extension. This should happen at core module initialization level. [b]Note:[/b] This cannot be called once OpenXR has been initialized.
